app.name: DIRD+
app.longDescription: Ophthalmological image analysis platform with edge-computing AI. All data remains on your device.

webWarning.title: Web Version — Demonstration Only
webWarning.intro: This web version of DIRD+ is intended for exploration and demonstration.
webWarning.bullet1: Do not enter real patient data (names, identifiers, medical history).
webWarning.bullet2: Data is stored in the browser (IndexedDB) and can be lost when clearing history or switching devices.
webWarning.bullet3: For real clinical use, install the desktop app: encryption at rest, backups and proper protection.
webWarning.legal: Using this web version with real clinical data may violate the data protection and medical confidentiality regulations that apply in your jurisdiction (e.g. GDPR in the EU, HIPAA in the US, Law 21.719 / Law 20.584 in Chile). You are responsible for compliance.
webWarning.acknowledge: I understand, continue with test data

ui.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this?

comingSoon.analysis: AI analysis will be available soon
comingSoon.reports: Report generation will be available soon

error.dbBlocked: Please close other tabs of this application to allow the database update.

confirmations.deleteImage: Are you sure you want to delete this image and all associated analyses?
confirmations.deleteSession: Are you sure you want to delete this session and all its data? This action cannot be undone.
confirmations.duplicateSession: Are you sure you want to duplicate this session? This will create a copy with the same items but unlocked.
confirmations.deletePatient: Are you sure you want to delete this patient and all their data? This action is irreversible.
confirmations.archivePatient: Are you sure you want to archive this patient?
confirmations.unarchivePatient: Are you sure you want to unarchive this patient?

patients.empty: No patients registered. Create one to start.

form.createDescription: Fill in the data to create a new patient

sessions.empty: No sessions registered. Create one to begin analysis.

form.name: Nombre del estudio

reportHistory.title: Historial de Informes

upload.galleryEmpty: No images in this study. Upload some to start analysis.
upload.dropzone: Drag files here or click to select

modal.title: Uploading Images
modal.description: Compressing and saving images to your device
modal.pleaseWait: Please wait, this process may take a few moments...

upload.photoLimitExceeded: Maximum of {{limit}} photos per study reached. No more images can be uploaded.
upload.photoLimitWarning: Only {{available}} more images can be uploaded (maximum {{limit}} per study).

tools.title: Tools
tools.selectInstruction: Click on an annotation to select it. You can drag to move or use handles to resize.
tools.bboxInstruction: Click and drag to draw a detection box
tools.eraserInstruction: Click on any annotation or measurement to delete it permanently.
tools.panInstruction: Click and drag to move the image. You can also use the middle mouse button at any time.
tools.zoomInstruction: Click on a mark to zoom to it. If already zoomed, click outside to reset. Ctrl+Click to zoom out. Use mouse wheel for continuous zoom.
tools.rulerInstruction: Click origin point, then click destination to measure distance in Disc Diameters (DD)
tools.landmarkInstruction: Click to place anatomical landmarks (optic disc or fovea). Drag to reposition.
tools.cupInstruction: Click to open the optic disc cup editor

classSelection.title: Select class
classSelection.description: Choose the class for this annotation
classSelection.label: Annotation class
classSelection.alert: Please select or type a class

redetection.title: AI Re-detection
redetection.description: This will delete all current AI detections for this image and re-run the analysis. Continue?

macular.noneInZone: No hard exudates within foveal zone
macular.onlyFewInZone: Only {{count}} hard exudate(s) within zone ({{min}} required)
macular.detectedInZone: {{count}} hard exudate(s) within {{distance}} μm of fovea
macular.detectedInZoneWithPattern: {{count}} hard exudate(s) forming a circinate pattern within {{distance}} μm of fovea

quadrants.fallbackWarning: ⚠ Fallback mode: Place landmarks for anatomical reference

errors.saveAnnotationError: Error saving annotation. Please try again.
errors.invalidBboxError: The annotation has invalid values. Please try again.

advancedEditor.tipDescription: You can exit advanced mode anytime by pressing 'Salir' in the top bar o usando Esc.
advancedEditor.desktopOnly: This feature is optimized for desktop displays (Desktop). On mobile devices, algunas funcionalidades pueden estar limitadas.

panel.title: Advanced Analysis
panel.hint: Activate analysis layers to view metrics

view.noDetections: No detections found. Process images with AI first.

drClassification.title: Diabetic Retinopathy Classification
drClassification.notGenerated: Process images with AI first to generate classification

contribution.warningText: This conclusion was manually modified. When contributing, make sure it does NOT contain patient personal data. Only contribute if the changes improve the classification in general.

drClassification.consoleHint: Full data available in browser console
drClassification.noteMultipleImages: You can select which image to use for analysis by clicking "images available".
drClassification.noteSingleImage: Showing analysis of the image for each eye.

detailsModal.title: Algorithm Details - {{eye}}
detailsModal.description: Detailed explanation of how the classification was determined
detailsModal.quadrantAnalysisDesc: The quadrant system based on optic disc and fovea was used to apply the 4-2-1 rule for NPDR severity.

algorithmSteps.step1Desc: The model identifies and counts microaneurysms, hemorrhages, exudates, and neovascularization.
algorithmSteps.step2Desc: If optic disc and fovea are detected, the 4-2-1 rule is applied by anatomical quadrants.
algorithmSteps.step3Desc: Severity level is determined according to international criteria (ICDR/ETDRS).
algorithmSteps.disclaimer: This is a diagnostic assistance system. Clinical correlation and specialist review are required.

reports.title: Informes
reports.evaluatorNotesPlaceholder: Draft your initial conclusions here (AI will refine and integrate them)...
reports.finalWarning: Note: The final report will lock the study and no more images or analyses can be added or removed.
reports.dialogDescription: Ensure all findings have been reviewed before generating the report.
reports.previewDescription: Generates a draft for internal review. Includes watermark and does not lock the study for future edits.
reports.finalizeDescription: Generates the official clinical report. Permanently locks the study to ensure data integrity.
reports.importantNoteBody: Generated reports are saved locally in the browser's database. You can access them from the "Report" tab of this study at any time.

dialog.previewExists: A preview already exists for this study
dialog.previewExistsDescription: You can review the preview in the reports list. Choose an option below:
dialog.regenerateDescription: Deletes current preview and generates a new one with updated notes.
dialog.regenerateConfirmDescription: The current preview will be deleted and a new one will be generated. Do you want to continue?
dialog.finalizeDescription: Generates the final report and permanently locks the study. No further changes can be made.
dialog.warningBody: Upon finalizing the report, the study will be locked and no further modifications can be made.
dialog.mustInteractFirst: You must view, download or edit the preview first

list.addFirst: Use the "Generate Report" button to create the first clinical report.
list.allReportsInfo: Generated reports will appear here for review.
list.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this preliminary report? This action cannot be undone.
list.finalizeConfirm: Are you sure you want to finalize this report? This action will convert it to final and lock the study permanently.
list.finalizeSuccess: Report finalized and downloaded successfully. The study has been locked.
list.editModalInfo: By default, the AI-enhanced version is shown. You can toggle with your original draft.
list.mustInteractFirst: You must view, download or edit the preview first

import.waitMessage: This may take a few moments
import.invalidFile: Invalid file. Please select a valid patient(s) .dird file.

changePassword.title: Change Password
changePassword.passwordLengthMessage: Password must be at least 8 characters
changePassword.securityNoteText: When changing your password, all active studies will be closed and you will need to log in again.

errors.passwordLength: New password must be at least 8 characters
errors.passwordSame: New password must be different from current

beaconMonitor.title: Active Help Beacons
beaconMonitor.noBeacons: No active beacons at this time
beaconMonitor.instructions: Users can activate beacons from their tokens panel
beaconMonitor.infoDescription: Beacons have a 5-minute duration. Users activate them when they need urgent help. They are automatically removed when expired.

messageBroadcast.title: Send Message to All Users
messageBroadcast.messagePlaceholder: Write the message that all users will see...
messageBroadcast.durationDescription: The message will automatically expire after this time
messageBroadcast.previewDescription: This is how users will see the message:

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Customize the application to your needs

contribution.warningText: Please ensure this guideline does NOT contain personal data, specific institution names, or confidential information. Remove any identifying references before contributing.

guidelines.title: Clinical Guideline Selection
guidelines.description: Select the clinical guideline to classify diabetic retinopathy according to different international standards

confirmDialog.title: Change Clinical Guideline?
confirmDialog.description: Changing the active clinical guideline will affect all future classifications. Existing classifications will retain their original guideline.
confirmDialog.warning: Note: If you have studies in progress, consider completing them before changing the guideline.

editor.title: Guideline Editor
editor.subtitle: Create and modify custom clinical guidelines

severity.description: Define severity levels for DR classification (in order from least to most severe)
severity.noLevels: No severity levels defined. Click "Add Level" to create one.

rules.description: Define classification rules based on lesion counts and other criteria
rules.noRules: No rules defined. Click "Add Rule" to create one.

treatment.description: Define treatment protocols and follow-up recommendations for each severity level
treatment.noProtocols: No treatment protocols defined. Click "Add Protocol" to create one.

emcs.enable: Enable EMCS (Clinically Significant Macular Edema) Criteria
emcs.name: Name

messages.exportContribution: Guideline exported and marked for contribution

validation.severityRequired: At least one severity level is required
validation.ruleConditionRequired: Rule {{index}}: At least one condition is required

classes.title: Model Class Management
classes.description: Personaliza los nombres y colores de las clases detectadas.
classes.rainbowModeDesc: If enabled, each class has its own color. Otherwise, the primary color is used.

ai.title: AI Conclusion Configuration
ai.customPromptPlaceholder: E.g., 'Use very simple language', 'Focus on macular edema', etc.

gallery.title: Gallery Options
gallery.warning: You must select at least one gallery option.

source.title: Model Source
source.localDescription: Uses locally stored ONNX models. Guarantees total privacy as all processing occurs on your device.
source.apiDescription: Connects to a custom API for inference. Useful for private, paid, or custom models hosted on servers.

models.title: Model Settings
models.description: Manage AI models downloaded from GitHub or local sources
models.info1: • Models are downloaded from GitHub and cached for offline use
models.info2: • Each repository branch contains a different model version
models.info3: • If download fails, local model will be used as fallback
models.info4: • Cache persists between studies and can be cleared at any time
models.downloadSuccess: Detection model downloaded and loaded successfully
models.clearCacheConfirm: Are you sure you want to clear the model cache?
models.modelInfoDescription: Technical details, performance metrics and analysis of the detection model

loader.errorLoading: No se pudieron cargar los modelos

processing.title: Processing Settings
processing.opticDiscRefinementDescription: Generate circular mask of the optic disc within the Model detected area
processing.cpuVendorDescription: Configure CPU vendor to optimize ONNX Runtime performance. In manual mode you'll see system warnings in console (this is normal).
processing.cpuVendorWarning: ⚠️ Only modify if you know what you're doing. Automatic mode is recommended for most users.

about.title: About DIRD+
about.description: Ophthalmological image analysis platform with edge-computing AI. All data remains on your device.
about.updateAvailable: New version available. Update recommended to get latest features and fixes.

processing.title: Processing Images
processing.description: Running AI analysis on study images
processing.pleaseWait: Please wait, this process may take a few moments...

contribution.title: Contribute
contribution.description: Help improve Dird with your contribution

donation.title: Support us with a coffee
donation.description: Your support helps us continue improving Dird

dialog.description: Contribuye con tu imagen y tus marcas para mejorar el modelo.
dialog.body1: The contribution includes the original image plus AI and manual annotations (detections, painted segmentations, classification), with differentiated coordinates and their corresponding classes.
dialog.body2: Your data will be anonymized (including image name serialization) before submission to guarantee privacy. Go to the "Contribute" section in the main menu to finalize submission and accept the terms.
dialog.selectLevel: Select what you want to contribute:
dialog.sessionMarked: {{count}} images from the session marked for contribution

images.title: Image Contributions
images.pendingMessage: You have {{count}} images marked for contribution. These images are invaluable for retraining and improving our detection models.
images.terms: I accept the terms and conditions. I understand that the images will be sent to improve AI models and contain no personally identifiable information.
images.error: There was an error sending the images. Please check the console or try again later.

guidelines.title: Clinical Guidelines Contributions
guidelines.pendingMessage: You have {{count}} pending clinical guidelines to contribute. Your custom protocols help expand available options.
guidelines.error: There was an error sending the guidelines.

conclusions.title: Conclusion Contributions
conclusions.pendingMessage: You have {{count}} modified conclusions to contribute. Your corrections improve AI accuracy.
conclusions.error: There was an error sending the conclusions.

all.terms: I accept the terms and conditions. I have verified that my contributions do NOT contain patient personal data and understand they will be used to improve DIRD.
all.privacyWarning: IMPORTANT: Before sending, verify that your contributions do NOT contain:

privacyList.item2: Dates of birth or identification numbers
privacyList.item4: Any information that allows identification of a person

all.privacyNote: We will also review and remove any personal data before using the contributions.

feedback.title: Send Feedback
feedback.placeholder: Write your comment or suggestion here...
feedback.eyePhotosDescription: Upload eye photos with whitening or marks to help improve the models

academy.title: Academy
academy.description: Learn how DIRD works and makes clinical decisions

tutorial.title: Interactive Tutorial
tutorial.description: A guided tour through the application and demo patient to learn how to use all DIRD features.

privacy.title: Total Privacy
privacy.description: DIRD runs entirely in your browser. AI models execute locally using WebAssembly, ensuring your patient images never leave your device.

ai.title: Edge-Computing Artificial Intelligence
ai.description: We use deep learning models specifically trained to detect diabetic retinopathy lesions. Models are downloaded once and available offline.

workflow.title: Workflow
workflow.step1: Create a patient and analysis study
workflow.step4: Review, edit and validate detections on interactive canvas
workflow.step5: Generate professional reports with severity classification

protocols.title: Medical Protocols
protocols.icdr: International Clinical Diabetic Retinopathy Disease Severity Scale
protocols.etdrs: Early Treatment Diabetic Retinopathy Study - Gold standard for grading

moderateNPDR.name: Moderate NPDR
moderateNPDR.criteria: More than microaneurysms, but less than severe

severeNPDR.name: Severe NPDR
severeNPDR.criteria: Meets 4-2-1 rule (Hemorrhages in 4Q, Venous beading in 2Q, or IRMA in 1Q)

decisionMaking.title: How Does the System Make Decisions?

step1.title: Lesion Detection
step1.description: The AI model identifies microaneurysms, hemorrhages, exudates and neovascularization in each image

step2.title: Quadrant Analysis
step2.description: Lesions are grouped by retinal quadrants (superior, inferior, nasal, temporal) based on optic disc location

step3.title: Severity Classification
step3.description: ICDR criteria are applied considering lesion type and distribution, patient risk factors, and bilateral analysis

current.title: Currently Detected
current.softExudatesDesc: Cotton wool spots - indicate retinal ischemia
current.neovascularizationDesc: Abnormal new vessels - proliferative DR criterion

future.title: In Development
future.irmaDesc: Intraretinal microvascular abnormalities - criterion for severe NPDR
future.venousBeadingDesc: Segmental venous dilations - criterion for severe NPDR
future.macularEdemaDesc: Fluid accumulation in macula - main cause of vision loss

disclaimer.title: Important Medical Notice
disclaimer.paragraph1: DIRD is an AI-powered diagnostic assistance tool. Classifications and suggestions generated by the system do NOT constitute a definitive medical diagnosis.
disclaimer.paragraph2: Validation and clinical judgment by a certified ophthalmologist is always required. This system is designed to support, not replace, professional medical judgment.

technicalDocs.description: Detailed technical documentation about the classification system

loading.title: Preparing DIRD
loading.subtitle: Loading required resources
loading.info: Loading the components required for the application to run.

loading.title: Preparing DIRD
loading.subtitle: Loading demo patient and resources
loading.firstTimeInfo: First load may take a few seconds while AI models and demo images are prepared.

modal.title: My Session Token
modal.description: This is your unique installation identifier:

beacon.adminNotified: The administrator has been notified of your help request.
beacon.activated: Beacon activated! The administrator will be notified.

info.title: ℹ️ What is the beacon?
info.description: The beacon will alert the administrator for 5 minutes. Use it when you need urgent help.

warnings.quadrantUnavailable: Quadrant analysis unavailable - Rule 4-2-1 precision reduced
warnings.rule421NotEvaluated: Rule 4-2-1 could not be fully evaluated
warnings.aiDisclaimer: This is an AI-assisted suggestion, not a definitive diagnosis
warnings.clinicalCorrelation: Clinical correlation and expert review required

pdr.urgentReferral: URGENT: Immediate referral to retina specialist required

riskFactors.longDuration: Long diabetes duration increases progression risk
